name: dry-run: --dry-run prints a "would: ..." line for each write that would have occurred
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-output "$PWD/out.yaml" --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -E 'would write: .*out.yaml' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/a.yaml
